hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[session-start] Flutter harness loaded at $(date +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")"; if [ -f pubspec.yaml ]; then echo "[session-start] Flutter project detected: $(grep "^name:" pubspec.yaml | head -1)"; FLUTTER_VERSION=$(flutter --version 2>/dev/null | head -1); echo "[session-start] $FLUTTER_VERSION"; fi; if [ -f .claude/contexts/dev.md ]; then echo "[session-start] Context loaded: dev.md"; fi'
hooks.description: Flutter セッション開始時に環境情報を表示

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.dart ]]; then dart format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "[dart-format] formatted: $FILE"; fi'
hooks.description: Dart ファイル編集後に dart format を自動適用

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.dart ]]; then ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); RESULT=$(flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos "$FILE" 2>&1 | grep -E "error:|warning:" | head -5); if [ -n "$RESULT" ]; then echo "[flutter-analyze] $FILE:"; echo "$RESULT"; fi; fi'
hooks.description: Dart ファイル編集後に flutter analyze を実行（エラー・警告のみ表示）

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.dart ]] && ! [[ "$FILE" == *_test.dart ]]; then TEST_FILE="${FILE%.dart}_test.dart"; if [ ! -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then echo "[test-reminder] テストファイルが見つかりません: $TEST_FILE"; fi; fi'
hooks.description: Dart ファイル編集時にテストファイルの存在チェック

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.dart ]]; then PRINTS=$(grep -n "^  print(" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "//"); if [ -n "$PRINTS" ]; then echo "[console-warn] print() が本番コードに含まれています: $FILE"; echo "$PRINTS"; echo "debugPrint() または logger パッケージの使用を検討してください"; fi; fi'
hooks.description: Dart ファイルの print() 警告

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.dart ]]; then SECRETS=$(grep -niE "api_key|apikey|secret|password|token|private_key" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "//"); if [ -n "$SECRETS" ]; then echo "[security-warn] ⚠️ 機密情報の可能性: $FILE"; echo "$SECRETS"; fi; fi'
hooks.description: Dart ファイルの機密情報ハードコード検出

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "flutter (build|run)"; then RESULT=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"output\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null | tail -5); echo "[build-log] $(date +"%H:%M:%S") $CMD"; fi'
hooks.description: flutter build/run コマンドの実行ログ

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "gh pr create"; then PR_URL=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT" | grep -oE "https://github\.com/[^ ]+"); if [ -n "$PR_URL" ]; then echo "[pr-created] PR作成: $PR_URL"; echo "レビューコマンド: gh pr view --web"; fi; fi'
hooks.description: PR 作成後の URL ログと review コマンド表示

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "flutter (build|run|test)" && [ -f pubspec.yaml ] && [ ! -f pubspec.lock ]; then echo "[pubspec-check] ⚠️ pubspec.lock が見つかりません。flutter pub get を先に実行してください。" >&2; exit 1; fi'
hooks.description: flutter コマンド前に pub get 未実行チェック

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git commit" && echo "$CMD" | grep -q "\-\-no\-verify"; then echo "[git-guard] ❌ --no-verify フラグは禁止されています。CI チェックをバイパスしないでください。" >&2; exit 1; fi'
hooks.description: git --no-verify フラグをブロック

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git push.*--force" && echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(main|master|develop)"; then echo "[git-guard] ❌ main/develop への force push は禁止されています。" >&2; exit 1; fi'
hooks.description: main/develop への force push をブロック

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "flutter test" && [ -f pubspec.yaml ]; then FAILED=$(flutter test --dry-run 2>/dev/null | grep -c FAILED || true); if [ "$FAILED" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[test-warn] ⚠️ $FAILED 個のテストが失敗しています。テストを確認してください。"; fi; fi'
hooks.description: flutter test 前の既存テスト失敗チェック

hooks.command: bash -c 'CONTEXT_DIR=".claude/contexts"; mkdir -p "$CONTEXT_DIR"; echo "# Session Context - $(date +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")" > "$CONTEXT_DIR/last-session.md"; echo "" >> "$CONTEXT_DIR/last-session.md"; if [ -f pubspec.yaml ]; then echo "## Flutter Project" >> "$CONTEXT_DIR/last-session.md"; grep "^name:\|^version:" pubspec.yaml >> "$CONTEXT_DIR/last-session.md"; fi; echo "" >> "$CONTEXT_DIR/last-session.md"; echo "## Recent Changes" >> "$CONTEXT_DIR/last-session.md"; git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | head -10 >> "$CONTEXT_DIR/last-session.md"; echo "[pre-compact] Context saved to $CONTEXT_DIR/last-session.md"'
hooks.description: コンテキスト圧縮前にセッション状態を保存

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f pubspec.yaml ]; then DART_FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep "\.dart$"); if [ -n "$DART_FILES" ]; then echo "[stop:format] Running dart format on changed files..."; echo "$DART_FILES" | xargs dart format 2>/dev/null; ISSUES=$(echo "$DART_FILES" | xargs flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos 2>&1 | grep "error:" | head -5); if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo "[stop:analyze] ⚠️ 未解決の Analyzer エラー:"; echo "$ISSUES"; fi; fi; fi'
hooks.description: セッション終了時に変更された Dart ファイルをフォーマット・解析

hooks.command: bash -c 'PRINT_COUNT=$(git diff HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep "^+" | grep -c "^+  print(" || true); if [ "$PRINT_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[stop:console] ⚠️ $PRINT_COUNT 個の print() が変更に含まれています。debugPrint() への変更を検討してください。"; fi'
hooks.description: セッション終了時に print() の残存チェック

hooks.command: bash -c 'LOG_DIR=".claude/logs"; mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"; echo "$(date +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") session-end" >> "$LOG_DIR/sessions.log"; CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l); echo "$(date +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") changed-files=$CHANGED" >> "$LOG_DIR/sessions.log"'
hooks.description: セッション終了ログの記録

hooks.command: bash -c 'if command -v osascript &>/dev/null; then osascript -e "display notification \"Claude Code セッション完了" with title \"Flutter Harness\"" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v notify-send &>/dev/null; then notify-send "Flutter Harness" "Claude Code セッション完了"; fi'
hooks.description: セッション終了時にデスクトップ通知（macOS/Linux）
